title: LMS - Learning Management System
description: A fully functional frontend for a learning website where users can watch tutorials and lectures. Built to make quality education accessible and impactful.

title: EMS - Employee Management System
description: A semi-functional Employee Management System built with React. Features task management with new tasks, task counts, and employee data stored via localStorage.

title: Online Piano
description: An interactive online piano built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Play musical notes directly in the browser using keyboard or mouse inputs.

title: YT Shorts UI Clone
description: A YouTube Shorts-style UI clone built with frontend technologies. Replicates the vertical short-video scrolling experience of YouTube Shorts.

title: Card Animations (Part 2)
description: An advanced set of CSS and JavaScript card animations — the sequel to Part 1. Features smooth hover effects, transitions, and interactive card UI components.
